text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I go up to the roof looking for Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh... Goin' dopey over fan mail isn't cool, but
damn if I don't love it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh, what's this? Is that supposed to be me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And yeah, I get fan mail sometimes too, y'know...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This one's got a drawing of me in it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha, it doesn't look anything like me though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I look so much cooler than this when I'm running.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure some kid did their best to draw this for
me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Stuff like this always speaks more to me than a
bunch of writing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna let the kid down, you know?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win the next race by a mile and show
everyone how cool I really am!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey! If ya keep starin' off into space, I'm just
gonna leave ya here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the young fan's letter has got Vodka
all fired up.
